resources.string: This screen explains the local safety contract for capability %1$s before Charge Pilot opens a setup route or attempts app-controlled writes.
Charge Pilot stores attempts on this device and does not upload operation history.
Only continue when you initiated the setup or toggle action.
Confirm charger, battery, foreground app, and brand-specific requirements in Home.
For Full builds, Shizuku control requires Shizuku installed, running, and authorized.
Samsung Game Booster bypass still depends on Samsung firmware accepting the Game Optimizing Service path.
